markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Framer publishing workflow and AI image generation strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Framer Publishing:** The workflow will use Framer's MCP (My Content Plugin) to publish AI-generated articles via the CMS. This method is required because Framer's API is decommissioned.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**MCP Constraint:** The MCP requires a user to be logged into Framer with the plugin open, which necessitates a manual review step before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**AI Image Strategy:** The current AI-generated images are too generic. The new direction is abstract, geometric art using HX's brand gradients to create a unique, ownable visual style.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** HX will grant GrowthX Framer access to build the MCP schema. HX will also provide visual examples to guide the new AI image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

## Topics

### Framer Publishing Workflow

  - [**Goal:** Automate publishing of AI-generated articles from Storyblock to Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Framer's API is decommissioned, requiring the use of the MCP (My Content Plugin).](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Solution:** Publish via Framer's CMS, not by filling content blocks in a template.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This method proved more reliable in testing, avoiding issues like incorrect content placement.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Process:** Use the MCP to populate a simple CMS metadata schema.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**MCP Constraint:** The plugin requires a user to be logged into Framer with the MCP receiver open.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [**Impact:** This necessitates a manual review step in the workflow before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Schema Ownership:** GrowthX will design the final CMS schema.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Rationale:** HX has no strong preferences and trusts GrowthX to build the most functional schema for the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### AI Image Generation Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Current AI-generated images are too generic and don't align with the new HX brand.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**New Direction:** Create abstract, geometric art that evokes the brand without directly illustrating article content.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach is more suitable for abstract topics and avoids a generic "AI iStockphoto" feel, ensuring brand ownability.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [**Creative Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Geometric shapes and mathematical concepts](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Rich brand gradients](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Layering](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**AI Limitations & Workarounds:**](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**Color Inconsistency:** AI struggles with exact hex codes.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
          - [**Workaround:** Use black & white illustrations or design a set of brand-compliant backgrounds for AI to generate on top of.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [**Complexity:** Highly complex scenes require significant refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
          - [**Decision:** Start with a simpler style to get to market quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Obtain Framer access from Frankie (via Erik) to build the MCP schema.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Develop the automated publishing workflow, incorporating the manual review step.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**HX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Provide visual examples to guide the new AI image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [Build new components (e.g., toggleable FAQ block) as needed for articles.](https://fathom.video/share/qh3ZkMtAeexyer-Rhxbr7h_XG_gqN6mD?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
